headline: Secret Network Flags 50% AI Threat, Eyes Arbitrum Shift

article.title: Secret Network cites AI exploit risks in proposed Arbitrum move
article.summary: “The security risk is the part we take most seriously,” the team said, citing old code and AI exploit risks.

headline: $14M Crypto Fraud Charged by CFTC Regulators

article.title: CFTC charges commodity, crypto pool operator with $14M fraud
article.summary: The CFTC has launched a rare crypto-related enforcement action against a commodity pool operator that allegedly defrauded investors of more than $14 million.

article.title: Bonds, Stocks Retreat as Mideast Tensions Lift Oil: Markets Wrap
article.summary: Oil prices climbed while bonds and stocks slipped after a flare-up in Middle East tensions reignited concerns over energy supplies, clouding the outlook for inflation and interest rates.

headline: Korea Stocks Plunge 20% Amid AI Selloff

article.title: Korean Stocks Extend Drop From Peak to 20% as AI Jitters Spread
article.summary: South Korea’s equity market extended declines, pushing the benchmark gauge toward a technical bear market as investors reassessed the outlook for artificial intelligence demand.

headline: Kraken Wins $22M Claim Against Former Auditor

article.title: Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
article.summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Kraken Seeks Final Judgment After $22 Million Award Against Former Auditor
Kraken is seeking a final Delaware court judgment against former auditor Mazars after winning a $22 million arbitration award, arguing the firm's abrupt resignation during heightened U.S. regulatory pressure

headline: Claude Code Tracker Removed Amid $1B Privacy Backlash

article.title: Anthropic Removes Hidden Claude Code Tracker After Researchers Raise Privacy Concerns
article.summary: The company says the tool was designed to stop abuse and AI model extraction, but critics questioned the use of undisclosed monitoring.

headline: SEC Unveils Crypto Safe Harbor This Month

article.summary: The SEC updated its agenda to indicate that a key crypto rulemaking is slated to be released for public comment in July.

headline: CFTC Sues NC Man Over $14M Crypto Fraud

article.title: CFTC charges North Carolina man over alleged $14 million crypto, futures fraud
article.summary: The CFTC charged a NC man and his company after the agency said he swindled about 60 people out of $14 million in a commodity pool.
